_meta.description: NCLEX-RN / NGN coverage map for AIWIZN scenarios. Each node maps to NCSBN Clinical Judgment Measurement Model (NCJMM) cognitive steps and NCLEX-RN Client Needs categories. Used by in-app badges and the formal Verification Report.

s1a.summary: STEMI recognition and pharmacology decisions under hypotension.

s1b1.summary: Prioritisation under family pressure during STEMI workflow.

s1b2.summary: SBAR communication clarity to interventional cardiology team.

s1c.summary: Ethical reasoning and respect for refusal of recommended care.

s2a.summary: Stroke onset time validation and tPA window assessment.

s2a2.summary: tPA risk-benefit decision under timeline uncertainty.

s2b.summary: Therapeutic communication during stroke fear and family distress.

s2c.summary: Discharge planning with social complexity and language access.

s3a.summary: Sepsis recognition and bundle initiation under uncertainty.

s3b.summary: Speaking up against a senior physician on patient safety grounds.

s3c.summary: Lactate trend interpretation and post-resuscitation reassessment.

s3c2.summary: ICU escalation despite team friction; trust the data.
